query: The useState set method is not reflecting a change immediately
headline: Many fixes coexist; useEffect leads but doesn’t dominate
body: The biggest camp is useEffect after state change at 48 of 163 practices (29%), with perfect within-cluster agreement, but that is far from a majority. The breakdown is broad rather than unanimous: using the local/event/response value immediately (27) and functional updater from previous state (19) are substantial rivals, followed by several smaller clusters and a long tail. Authority is spread across multiple approaches, and the answers are concentrated in 2023-2024, so there is no solid temporal trajectory to read.
_note: query/group_size = Module C placeholders; shape/authority/temporal/headline/body = D-4 LLM output
